title: Anti-Gravity Drive Infographic
sourceTitle: Do This Anti Gravity Drive Root Invention

imagePrompts.prompt: do this for an anti-gravity drive: :root {   --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* e.g., "A Nuclear Battery", "An Anti-Gravity Drive" */ }  # canvas {   background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; }  # compositing {   /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */   base_layer: "A flat sheet of traditional cyan-blue blueprint paper. It is covered in highly detailed, white-ink architectural charts, math, and text describing var(--invention).";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */   top_layer: "The physical, photorealistic 3D var(--invention). Heavy, metallic, casting a shadow.";      /* THE TRANSITION (THE PEEL) */   interaction: "A section of the 3D machine's metal casing is physically peeling back like a sheet of paper, revealing that the *inside* of the machine is made of the flat, 2D blueprint data charts and text. A surreal blend of physical engineering and 2D data visualization."; }

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

do this for an anti-gravity drive: :root {   --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* e.g., "A Nuclear Battery", "An Anti-Gravity Drive" */ }  # canvas {   background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; }  # compositing {   /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */   base_layer: "A flat sheet of traditional cyan-blue blueprint paper. It is covered in highly detailed, white-ink architectural charts, math, and text describing var(--invention).";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */   top_layer: "The physical, photorealistic 3D var(--invention). Heavy, metallic, casting a shadow.";      /* THE TRANSITION (THE PEEL) */   interaction: "A section of the 3D machine's metal casing is physically peeling back like a sheet of paper, revealing that the *inside* of the machine is made of the flat, 2D blueprint data charts and text. A surreal blend of physical engineering and 2D data visualization."; }

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

do this for an anti-gravity drive: :root {   --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* e.g., "A Nuclear Battery", "An Anti-Gravity Drive" */ }  # canvas {   background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; }  # compositing {   /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */   base_layer: "A flat sheet of traditional cyan-blue blueprint paper. It is covered in highly detailed, white-ink architectural charts, math, and text describing var(--invention).";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */   top_layer: "The physical, photorealistic 3D var(--invention). Heavy, metallic, casting a shadow.";      /* THE TRANSITION (THE PEEL) */   interaction: "A section of the 3D machine's metal casing is physically peeling back like a sheet of paper, revealing that the *inside* of the machine is made of the flat, 2D blueprint data charts and text. A surreal blend of physical engineering and 2D data visualization."; }

A surreal blend of physical engineering and 2D data visualization."; }

imagePrompts.title: Do This Anti Gravity Drive Root Invention

prompt: do this for an anti-gravity drive: :root {   --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* e.g., "A Nuclear Battery", "An Anti-Gravity Drive" */ }  # canvas {   background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; }  # compositing {   /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */   base_layer: "A flat sheet of traditional cyan-blue blueprint paper. It is covered in highly detailed, white-ink architectural charts, math, and text describing var(--invention).";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */   top_layer: "The physical, photorealistic 3D var(--invention). Heavy, metallic, casting a shadow.";      /* THE TRANSITION (THE PEEL) */   interaction: "A section of the 3D machine's metal casing is physically peeling back like a sheet of paper, revealing that the *inside* of the machine is made of the flat, 2D blueprint data charts and text. A surreal blend of physical engineering and 2D data visualization."; }

It is covered in highly detailed, white-ink architectural charts, math, and text describing var(--invention).";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */   top_layer: "The physical, photorealistic 3D var(--invention). A surreal blend of physical engineering and 2D data visualization."; }

promptTranslations.zh: 为反重力驱动器执行此操作： :root { --invention: "$groundwriting_technology"; /* 例如，“核电池”、“反重力驱动器” */ } # canvas { background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; } # compositing { /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */ base_layer: "一张传统的青蓝色蓝图纸。上面覆盖着非常详细的白色墨水建筑图表、数学和描述 var(--invention) 的文本。";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */ top_layer: "物理的、逼真的 3D var(--发明)。沉重、金属、投射阴影。";      /* 过渡（剥离）*/ 交互：“3D 机器的金属外壳的一部分像一张纸一样物理剥离，揭示了机器的*内部*由平面、2D 蓝图数据图表和文本组成。物理工程和 2D 数据可视化的超现实融合。”； }
promptTranslations.fr: faites ceci pour un lecteur anti-gravité : :root { --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* par exemple, "Une batterie nucléaire", "Un moteur anti-gravité" */ } # canvas { background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; } # compositing { /* COUCHE 1 (BOTTOM) */ base_layer: "Une feuille plate de papier à dessin traditionnel bleu cyan. Elle est recouverte de graphiques architecturaux à l'encre blanche très détaillés, de mathématiques et de texte décrivant var(--invention).";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */ top_layer: "La variable 3D physique et photoréaliste (--invention). Lourde, métallique, projetant une ombre.";      /* LA TRANSITION (LE PEEL) */ interaction : "Une section du boîtier métallique de la machine 3D se décolle physiquement comme une feuille de papier, révélant que l'*intérieur* de la machine est constitué de graphiques et de textes plats de données 2D. Un mélange surréaliste d'ingénierie physique et de visualisation de données 2D."; }
promptTranslations.ru: сделайте это для антигравитационного двигателя: :root { --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* например, «Ядерная батарея», «Антигравитационный привод» */ } # Canvas { background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; } # compositing { /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */ base_layer: "Плоский лист традиционной голубо-синей бумаги для чертежей. Он покрыт очень подробными архитектурными схемами, написанными белыми чернилами, математическими вычислениями и текстом, описывающим var(--invention).";      /* СЛОЙ 2 (ВЕРХНИЙ) */ top_layer: "Физическая, фотореалистичная 3D-вар(--изобретение). Тяжелая, металлическая, отбрасывающая тень.";      /* ПЕРЕХОД (ОТКРЫТИЕ) */ взаимодействие: «Часть металлического корпуса 3D-машины физически отслаивается, как лист бумаги, показывая, что *внутренняя* машина состоит из плоских 2D-схем данных чертежей и текста. Сюрреалистическая смесь физической инженерии и 2D-визуализации данных.»; }
promptTranslations.pt: faça isso para uma unidade antigravidade: :root { --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* por exemplo, "Uma bateria nuclear", "Uma unidade antigravitacional" */ } # canvas { background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; } # compositing { /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */ base_layer: "Uma folha plana de papel tradicional azul-ciano. Ela é coberta por gráficos arquitetônicos altamente detalhados em tinta branca, matemática e texto que descreve var(--invention).";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */ top_layer: "A var(--invention) física e fotorrealista em 3D. Pesado, metálico, lançando uma sombra.";      /* A TRANSIÇÃO (A DESCASCAÇÃO) */ interação: "Uma seção do invólucro de metal da máquina 3D está descascando fisicamente como uma folha de papel, revelando que o *interior* da máquina é feito de texto e gráficos de dados planos em 2D. Uma mistura surreal de engenharia física e visualização de dados 2D."; }
promptTranslations.ja: 反重力ドライブに対してこれを実行します。 :root { --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* 例: 「核電池」、「反重力ドライブ」 */ } # Canvas { 背景: # Wood_Drafting_Table; } # compositing { /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */base_layer: "伝統的なシアンブルーの青写真用紙の平らなシート。非常に詳細な白インクの建築図、数学、および var(--invention) を説明するテキストで覆われています。";      /* レイヤー 2 (上部) */ top_layer: "物理的でフォトリアリスティックな 3D var(--invention)。重くて金属的で、影を落としています。";      /* 移行 (皮) */ インタラクション: "3D マシンの金属ケーシングの一部が紙のように物理的に剥がれ、マシンの *内部* が平らな 2D 青写真データ チャートとテキストでできていることが明らかになります。物理エンジニアリングと 2D データ視覚化の超現実的な融合です。"; }
promptTranslations.ko: 반중력 드라이브에 대해 다음을 수행하십시오: :root { --invention: "$groundbreaking_technology"; /* 예: "핵 배터리", "반중력 드라이브" */ } # canvas { background: # Wooden_Drafting_Table; } # 합성 { /* LAYER 1 (BOTTOM) */ base_layer: "전통적인 청록색 청사진 용지의 평평한 시트입니다. 매우 상세한 흰색 잉크 건축 차트, 수학 및 var(--invention)을 설명하는 텍스트로 덮여 있습니다.";      /* LAYER 2 (TOP) */ top_layer: "물리적이고 사실적인 3D var(--invention). 무겁고 금속성이며 그림자를 드리웁니다.";      /* 전환(박리) */ 상호 작용: "3D 기계의 금속 케이스 부분이 종이처럼 물리적으로 벗겨지면서 기계의 *내부*가 평평한 2D 청사진 데이터 차트와 텍스트로 구성되어 있음을 알 수 있습니다. 물리적 엔지니어링과 2D 데이터 시각화의 초현실적인 혼합입니다."; }
